entry.name: widgetIcon
entry.label: Custom icon for the compact widget button.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentMonitor
entry.label: Show only open windows from the current monitor.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentVirtualDesktop
entry.label: Show only open windows from the current virtual desktop.

entry.name: accentColor
entry.label: Accent color used for the selected or hovered tile.

entry.name: monitorSelectionMode
entry.label: How the dashboard chooses which monitor to open on.

entry.name: targetMonitorName
entry.label: Name of the selected target monitor when using a specific monitor.

entry.name: usePlasmaSearchPlugins
entry.label: Use KDE Plasma search plugins through KRunner.

entry.name: searchResultShowName
entry.label: Show application names in search results.

entry.name: searchResultShowCategoryHeader
entry.label: Show category name and icon in search results.
